data.title: SOL price at $78.81, RSI 38.44 signals reversal. Target set $85-90 by April end if resistance breaks.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Solana is currently trading at $78.81, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 38.44, indicating oversold conditions. Analysts predict that SOL may reach the $85-90 range in the next 3-4 weeks if it manages to break through key resistance levels. This suggests a potential upside from its current price.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops New Accessory for Storing Soft Produce (HWT-3075)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 7, 2026, an inventor from Grand Rapids, Michigan, shared the inspiration behind creating the AVOCADO HAMMOCK. Concerned about soft produce getting bruised when placed on hard surfaces, the inventor sought a better storage solution for items like avocados. The innovative design of the AVOCADO HAMMOCK aims to prevent bruising and extend the shelf life of delicate produce items. This new product offers a unique way to store items in the kitchen and may revolutionize the way consumers preserve their fruits and vegetables.
Euronext N.V. to hold its Annual General Meeting soon, discussing key matters.

data.title: EFG Expands Leadership with Industry Expert Karl Nilsen Joining as Vice President of Underwriting
data.description: Karl Nilsen, with over 20 years of experience in the automotive industry, has been appointed as the Vice President of Underwriting in EFG Companies' Underwriting and Risk Department based in Dallas. This move further strengthens the department's expertise in handling claims administration.
Coface releases its 2025 Universal Registration Document.

data.title: KPN reports on progress of € 250m share buyback
data.description: Between March 30 and April 3, 2026, KPN bought back 800,000 ordinary shares at an average price of €4.80 each, totaling €3.8 million. This buyback is part of a larger €250 million share repurchase program initiated on January 29, 2026, demonstrating KPN's dedication to consistently providing added value to its shareholders through capital returns.

data.title: Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute Phase 3 Trial Demonstrates Initial Clinical Benefit of Novel Immunotherapy For Advanced Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
data.description: The results of the initial stage of the PRESERVE-003 Phase 3 clinical trial, featuring gotistobart, have been released in Nature Medicine. The evaluation included collaboration with the Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute, LLC (FCS). This significant milestone was reached in Fort Myers, Florida on April 7, 2026. Key data from this stage showcases promising outcomes and advances in cancer research.
Total voting rights and shares comprising share capital for FORVIA disclosed; no exact figures released.

data.title: New MultiTech Niagara Driver Enables the Convergence of IoT and BMS for Smart Buildings
data.description: A prominent IoT devices and connectivity solutions company, MultiTech Systems, recently introduced the MultiTech Niagara Driver at the Tridium Niagara Summit held from April 7-9, 2026, at the Gaylord. This innovative product launch signifies a significant advancement in the industry, showcasing MultiTech Systems' commitment to cutting-edge technology and solutions. The event gathered numerous professionals and experts to witness this milestone in IoT development.

data.title: New York Butcher Shoppe and The Foundry Group Announce Strategic Investment Partnership
data.description: A specialty retailer based in Columbia, South Carolina, is gearing up for rapid growth and sustained value enhancement. New York Butcher Shoppe, a beloved local butcher and specialty market famous for its top-quality Certified Angus Beef® steaks, premium wines, and gourmet chef-prepared dishes, made this announcement on April 7, 2026. The retailer is well-known for its commitment to quality and has become a go-to destination for customers seeking high-end products. With a focus on expanding its reach, the company is set to increase its presence in the market and enhance its value proposition for customers and investors.
Marie Brizard Wine & Spirits reports monthly total voting rights and shares.

data.title: Cardano price targets $0.30 after testing $0.24 support. Break above $0.26 resistance may lead to rally. Immediate support at $0.23 crucial.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cardano is currently trading at $0.24 with neutral technical signals. Analysis indicates a possible increase to $0.30 if ADA surpasses the resistance level of $0.26, while the crucial immediate support stands at $0.23.

data.title: Latitude Promotes Former GC Joan Blackwell to Vice President of Strategic Initiatives
data.description: Latitude, a leading global legal staffing company based in Nashville, Tennessee, announced the appointment of a new executive to support its ongoing expansion and operational efficiency. The company, known for connecting law firms and corporate legal departments with experienced attorneys from prestigious backgrounds, disclosed this development on April 7, 2026. Latitude offers flexibility in legal staffing and prides itself on its diverse pool of former in-house and Big Law attorneys.

data.title: Muse Completes “Sleep, by Design” Platform with Smart Wakeup: A Smarter Alarm That Wakes Your Brain Up at the Right Time
data.description: In Toronto, Muse by Interaxon introduced Smart Wakeup, the latest feature on its Sleep, by Design platform. Smart Wakeup utilizes real-time brain activity monitoring to trigger a soft audio alarm during lighter sleep stages for a more gentle wake-up experience. The Sleep Assist function aids in falling asleep, while Deep Sleep Boost improves the quality of the deepest sleep stage. Smart Wakeup is designed as a brain-conscious alarm that preserves the sleep accomplished.

data.title: Buchanan Capital Partners and The Hanover Company Close Joint Venture for North Airport Logistics Center
data.description: Austin, TX - On April 7, 2026, Buchanan Capital Partners (BCP), a commercial real estate investment firm in Austin, disclosed the successful capitalization and closure of the North Airport Logistics Center.
